items.label: Scottie Scheffler (+450 to +500):
items.body: The betting favorite and defending Heritage champion profile in the latest market snapshots, with elite tee-to-green play and a proven Harbour Town track record.

items.label: Rory McIlroy (+1200):
items.body: Still priced among the top tier after a strong Masters week, with enough length and shot-making to contend if the irons stay sharp.

items.label: Ludvig Aberg (+1400 to +1600):
items.body: One of the strongest ball strikers in the field and a natural fit for Harbour Town’s precision test.

items.label: Collin Morikawa (+1600 to +1800):
items.body: Elite approach player whose ceiling rises on tighter, accuracy-heavy setups like this one.

items.label: Xander Schauffele (+1600 to +2000):
items.body: A reliable major-caliber performer with the all-around game to navigate Harbour Town’s demands.

items.label: Justin Thomas (+1800 to +2200):
items.body: The defending champion, returning to a course where short-game touch and aggressive iron play matter.

items.label: Tommy Fleetwood (+2000 to +2200):
items.body: A strong course fit thanks to his control off the tee and steady long-iron play.

items.label: Russell Henley (+2200 to +2500):
items.body: A precise iron player with a strong history of contending on strategic, second-shot courses.

items.label: Cameron Young (+2500 to +3000):
items.body: A high-upside option whose power and improved control can translate well if Harbour Town plays firm.

items.label: Signature Event Strength:
items.body: The RBC Heritage is the fourth of eight Signature Events this season, with a $20 million purse and a deep 82-player field set at Harbour Town.

items.label: Post-Masters Spotlight:
items.body: The event lands immediately after the Masters, so form, fatigue, and momentum from Augusta are major talking points this week.

items.label: Defending Champion:
items.body: Justin Thomas returns as the defending champion, adding extra attention to one of the best players in the field.

items.label: Field Headliners:
items.body: Latest field reports list Scottie Scheffler, Ludvig Åberg, Tommy Fleetwood, J.J. Spaun, and Cameron Young among the top names in the draw.

items.label: Venue:
items.body: Harbour Town Golf Links on Hilton Head Island, South Carolina, remains one of the PGA Tour’s most distinctive precision tests.

items.label: Format:
items.body: The 2026 RBC Heritage is a Signature Event with an 80-to-82-player field and no cut, depending on the final entry list and withdrawals.

items.label: Recent Winners:
items.body: Scottie Scheffler won here in 2024, and Justin Thomas captured the title in 2025.

items.label: History Fit:
items.body: Harbour Town has long favored accuracy, patience, and strong wedge play over raw power.

items.label: Course:
items.body: Harbour Town Golf Links, Hilton Head Island, South Carolina.

items.label: Par and Yardage:
items.body: Par 71, listed at 7,191 yards in the latest event references.

items.label: Purse:
items.body: $20 million.

items.label: Thursday, April 16:
items.body: 2-6 p.m. ET on Golf Channel.

items.label: Friday, April 17:
items.body: 2-6 p.m. ET on Golf Channel.

items.label: Saturday, April 18:
items.body: 1-3 p.m. ET on Golf Channel, then 3-6 p.m. ET on CBS.

items.label: Sunday, April 19:
items.body: 1-3 p.m. ET on Golf Channel, then 3-6 p.m. ET on CBS.
